summary: Completed testing of 4 new SSC Track features: Cross-branch payments, Reports hub, Missing data alerts, and Invoice upload. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test expenses and supplier payments created during tests were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features fully functional: (1) Dashboard shows Data Entry Alerts widget with 12 alerts for missing data, (2) Reports page is a clean hub with 4 categorized sections (Financial Reports, Analytics & Insights, Operations, Tools) with clickable cards, (3) Expenses page has Paid By Branch, Expense For Branch dropdowns and Invoice Optional file upload, (4) Supplier Payments page has same cross-branch fields in both Pay Credit and Add Bill forms

1_missing_data_alerts.details: Dashboard displays Data Entry Alerts card showing branches with no sales/expenses for yesterday and today. API returns correct structure with alerts array and check_dates.

2_reports_hub_layout.details: Reports page shows clean hub with 4 categorized sections: Financial Reports (7 cards), Analytics & Insights (6 cards), Operations (3 cards), Tools (1 card). Cards navigate to individual report pages when clicked.

3_cross_branch_expense_fields.details: Expenses page has 'Paid By (Branch)' and 'Expense For (Branch)' dropdown fields clearly labeled. Expense model has expense_for_branch_id field. API accepts and stores cross-branch expense data correctly.

4_optional_invoice_upload.details: Expenses page has 'Invoice (Optional)' file upload field. Upload API at /api/expenses/upload-bill accepts images/PDFs and returns bill_url. Creating expense without invoice works correctly.

5_supplier_payment_cross_branch.details: Supplier Payments page has 'Paid By (Branch)' and 'Expense For (Branch)' fields in both Pay Credit and Add Bill forms. Transactions table shows Paid By and Expense For columns.
